reflection.subtitle_today: Not about excuses — just 100% honest with yourself.
reflection.subtitle_yesterday: Some things didn't get done yesterday. It's not too late to reflect.

reflection.placeholder_yesterday: What happened yesterday? Maybe tired, maybe interrupted… just be honest, mochi doesn't judge 🌿

installBanner.installDesc: Install to your desktop for quick access 🌱

welcome.s0_body: This isn't a productivity tool that pushes you. It's a gentle reward system that helps you slowly become the person you want to be. Little bear mochi will be with you every step 🌱
welcome.s1_body: Write down habits you want to build or break. Completing each one earns you points.
welcome.s1_f1: Easy · 5 pt (e.g. drink water, tidy up)
welcome.s1_f4: Consecutive check-ins build a streak 🔥 — don't let it die!
welcome.s2_body: Set a rhythm that works for you. Check the calendar anytime to review your progress.
welcome.s2_f3: Custom days — pick specific days each week
welcome.s2_f4: Free — whenever you feel like it
welcome.s2_f5: Tap the calendar icon to view each habit's history
welcome.s3_body: Build "if…then" trigger rules so behaviour happens automatically — no willpower needed.
welcome.s3_ex1_then: feet on the floor immediately, no snoozing
welcome.s3_ex2_then: write down today's most important task first
welcome.s4_body: Build your own reward list and redeem points for things you truly want. The core idea: "I worked hard, so I deserve this."
welcome.s4_f4: Big rewards — any dream list item
welcome.s5_body: Note three things you're grateful for each day. Write a bedtime reflection and let mochi give you a gentle word of encouragement 🐻
welcome.s5_f1: Daily gratitude card — record 3 things to be thankful for
welcome.s5_f2: Evening reflection — unlocks after 11:55 PM, +10 pt
welcome.s5_f3: Next-day catch-up — forgot yesterday? You can still write it
welcome.s5_f4: Weekly review — write your proudest moment this week +15 pt
welcome.s5_f5: Rest day — it's okay to say "I need a break today"
welcome.s6_body: The growth page records every day of effort. Achievement badges unlock quietly as you hit milestones.
welcome.s6_f1: Monthly heat map — spot your active days at a glance
welcome.s6_f3: Total points / longest streak / growth days stats
welcome.s6_f4: Achievement badges — first check-in, 100-day challenge, expert…
welcome.s7_body: Change theme colour, set language, and update your nickname in the profile page to build your own growth space.
welcome.s7_lang: · 7 languages: Traditional & Simplified Chinese, EN, Japanese, Korean, ES, PT
welcome.s8_body: Remember — you're not being forced to grow. You're slowly becoming the person you want to be. One small thing, one check-in — that's the best start.

guideHint.text: Tap here to see the feature guide ✨

gratitudeQuotes: Practice noticing the good — warmth will slowly return
Even the smallest thing glows when it's remembered
What made you smile, even just a little, today?
Gratitude doesn't have to be grand, just honest
